title: Unable to iterate over hierarchy using VPI
body:
In version 5.022 I was able to iterate over hierarchy by creating the following iterator:
```cpp
vpiHandle module_iter = vpi_iterate(vpiModule, root_handle);
```
But after update to 5.024 (also happens on 5.026) this line returns `nullptr`.
I also noticed that `Verilated::scopesDump()` on 5.022 includes to level modules:
```
  scopesDump:
    SCOPE 0x72870bd3aec0: TOP.aes_core
    SCOPE 0x72870bd3aef8: TOP.aes_core._552_
       VAR 0x5b20f2061d48: ZN
       VAR 0x5b20f2061dc8: cell_kind
...
```
But after 5.024 it looks like this (no `TOP.aes_core`):
```
  scopesDump:
    SCOPE 0x782868622ec0: TOP.aes_core._552_
       VAR 0x5b2088ce9158: ZN
       VAR 0x5b2088ce91d8: cell_kind
...
```

I looked at changes and I suspect that https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/4918 or https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/4965 could cause it.
